description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with highly distorted and abstracted human features. The figure appears elongated, with exaggerated limbs and a narrow torso, and the proportions are not anatomically accurate. The lower body is dominated by a large, angular form, while the upper body and head are stretched and twisted, giving a surreal appearance. The surface is smooth and lacks detailed facial or anatomical features, making it difficult to discern gender or specific identity. The object is composed of several color blocks, with a prominent blue lower section and reddish-brown and beige tones above. There are no visible accessories or carried items, and the overall form is more sculptural than realistic.
description: An abstract, elongated adult pedestrian figure with exaggerated limbs and a large, angular lower body, featuring smooth surfaces and bold color blocks.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the elongated neck and angular blue lower body.
description_view_1: A side view emphasizes the stretched limbs and the thin, extended form of the figure.
description_view_2: From above, the angular and twisted nature of the torso and limbs is most apparent, with overlapping forms.
description_view_3: This view shows the figure's profile, with the large blue lower section and the extended, abstracted arms.
attribute_clothing_type: abstract sculptural form with no discernible clothing style or garment type
attribute_footwear_type: indistinct sculpted base, no clear footwear
attribute_hairstyle: indistinct, abstracted head with no clear hairstyle
